rationale: Educ. Code §33.210 concerns tort liability immunity for school districts and their officers or employees. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) affects property tax appraisal values and has no bearing on immunity provisions.
quote: This subchapter does not waive any liability or immunity of a school district or its officers or employees.
_note: No conflict. §33.210 addresses school district tort immunity; proposed change pertains to property tax homestead exemption amounts. Statutes operate in unrelated domains.
